resources.string: Temporarily slows the falling speed of pieces.
Clears the board after you complete a line.
Coin usage: Coins earned from gameplay can be used to buy power-ups and overcome difficult levels.
Power-ups: Slow Fall temporarily reduces piece falling speed, while Explosion clears all existing pieces when a single row is completed.
How to buy: Tap the Buy button next to an item in the shop. The cost will be deducted from your balance and the item added to your inventory.
Fuel your next win with coins, lives, and power boosters.
Instantly refill your wallet and keep the win streak alive.
A launch boost for new champions: coins, lives, and match-saving boosters.
Recover from a tough board and jump back into the action with extra hearts.
Break blockers faster with rockets, bombs, and color magic.
Turn a near loss into a comeback with lives, coins, and emergency boosters.
A premium burst of value built for hard levels and hot streaks.
%1$s is ready. Your next level just got easier.
Collect more coins to unlock this reward.
You can buy this product again in %1$s.
Gentle tactile feedback for premium game interactions.
Review data transparency, rights, contact, and deletion requests.
Email Dev impact support for help or data requests.
Dev impact studio and developer details.
No email app is available on this device.
Google Play is not available on this device.
Dev impact creates polished mobile game experiences focused on clarity, fair play, privacy, and responsive support.

We respect your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains what information Tetrixa and Dev impact may collect, how that information is used, how it may be shared, how long it is retained, and how you can contact us about your privacy rights.
This policy applies to Tetrixa unless a separate notice is provided in the app.

Depending on how you use the app, we may process limited technical and gameplay-related information, including device and app diagnostics, advertising identifiers where permitted, consent status, crash or performance data, support messages you send to us, and gameplay economy data stored on your device such as coins, lives, boosters, and settings preferences.
We do not ask you to create an account in the current app experience.

We use information to operate the game, remember local settings, provide support, improve performance and stability, show advertising where permitted, prevent abuse, comply with legal obligations, and respond to privacy or deletion requests.

Tetrixa uses Google Mobile Ads and Google User Messaging Platform to manage advertising consent where required. Advertising partners may process device or ad-related information according to your consent choices, applicable law, and their own policies. You can review privacy options from the app settings when privacy options are required for your region.

We may share limited information with service providers that help us operate, analyze, secure, support, or monetize the app. These providers may include advertising, analytics, crash reporting, platform, and email providers. We may also disclose information if required by law or to protect users, the app, or our rights.

Where GDPR or similar laws apply, we rely on appropriate legal bases such as consent, performance of a service requested by you, legitimate interests in security and app improvement, and compliance with legal obligations.

We retain information only for as long as needed for the purposes described in this policy, unless a longer retention period is required by law. Local gameplay data remains on your device until you clear app data or uninstall the app. Support messages are retained only as long as needed to answer your request and maintain reasonable support records.
We use reasonable technical and organizational measures designed to protect information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.
Depending on the services used to operate the app, information may be processed in countries other than your own. Where required, appropriate safeguards are used for such transfers.

Depending on your location, you may have rights to request access, correction, deletion, portability, restriction, objection, or withdrawal of consent. To exercise privacy rights, contact us at carta.net.play@gmail.com and include enough detail for us to understand and process your request.

You can request deletion of personal information by emailing carta.net.play@gmail.com. You can also delete local gameplay data by clearing the app data or uninstalling the app from your device. We will process deletion requests within a reasonable time and in accordance with applicable law.

Tetrixa is not intentionally directed to children in violation of applicable law. If you believe a child has provided personal information to us, contact us so we can review and delete it where appropriate.
We may update this policy from time to time. Material changes will be made available in the app or through another appropriate notice.
Publisher / Developer: SLIMANE Salim Email: carta.net.play@gmail.com
Something went wrong. Please try again.
You do not have enough coins for this action.
Unable to connect. Check your connection and try again.
The store is unavailable right now. Please try again later.
The ad is not ready yet. Please continue playing.
Your current board will be reset.
Return to Tetrixa to claim your next boost.
Check back later for new treasure packs.
Earn coins and unlock boosts from the shop.
